markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content quality issues with Gitpod's AI-generated blog posts and explore solutions for maintaining high technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gitpod's content requires extremely high technical accuracy due to their developer-focused audience and security-centric product](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Current AI-generated content isn't meeting quality standards, leading to a backlog of unpublished pieces](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Gitpod is considering involving industry experts for pre-publication review to ensure technical accuracy and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [GrowthX is exploring ways to integrate expert review into their content creation process to meet Gitpod's needs](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Challenges

  - [Gitpod unlisted all GrowthX-produced content due to quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Issues include:](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [Outdated sources (2018-2019) for a rapidly evolving field](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Contradictions and redundancies within articles](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
      - [Technically inaccurate statements requiring expert verification](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Misalignment with Gitpod's specific messaging (e.g., avoiding "cloud platform" terminology)](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Only 2 people at Gitpod can currently review content, creating a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

### Current Content Review Process

  - [Talia and one other person (ex-engineer, now PMM) handle all reviews](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Recent company offsite has created a backlog of \~10 pieces awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [GrowthX's editor (Jen) has improved based on feedback but can't fully bridge the technical gap](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Potential Solutions

  - [Integrate an industry expert into the content creation process for technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Consider creating separate content streams for SEO-focused vs. high-stakes technical content](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Improve the initial style guide and messaging guidelines provided to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Explore how other companies (e.g., Abnormal Security) handle varying content quality bars](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Additional Content Needs

  - [Gitpod interested in outsourcing technical tutorials and "how-to" guides](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [High stakes due to instructing users to run code](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring similar solutions for other clients (e.g., Webflow's developer docs)](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to start a Slack thread with Dave, Marcel, and Jen to discuss expert integration](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore efficient ways to involve domain experts in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Talia to continue sharing use cases and challenges as they arise](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX to update Gitpod on any progress with technical tutorial content generation for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/1bGpkgPwfHNjGKB79vKMGisJ6nBNxcMe?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
